general.notFound: The requested resource was not found
general.badRequest: The request is invalid or malformed

auth.accountLocked: Account locked due to too many failed OTP attempts

users.cannotCreateForOtherCompanies: Cannot create users for other companies
users.alreadyActivated: User has already activated their account
users.onlyResetActiveUsers: Can only reset password for active users
users.cannotCancelInvitation: Cannot cancel invitation for an active or inactive user
users.cannotDeactivateLastAdmin: Cannot deactivate the last Company Admin
users.cannotChangeLastAdminRole: Cannot change the role of the sole active Company Admin. Assign another Company Admin first.

companies.contactEmailRequired: contactEmail is required for Vendor companies

projects.notMember: Not a member of this project
projects.endDateBeforeStart: Expected end date must be after start date
projects.duplicateName: A project with this name already exists in your company
projects.cannotChangeAssignedUsers: Procurement Officers cannot change assigned users
projects.userNotMember: User is not a member of this project
projects.cannotRemoveLastMember: Cannot remove the last member from a project
projects.cannotRemoveLastAdmin: Cannot remove the last Company Admin from the project
projects.cannotRemoveCreator: Cannot remove the project creator (auto-assigned Procurement Officer)
projects.usersNotFoundOrInactive: Users not found or not active in the same company: {{ids}}
projects.deliveryLocationRequired: At least one delivery location is required
projects.storageLocationRequired: At least one storage location is required
projects.defaultDeliveryRequired: At least one default delivery location is required
projects.defaultStorageRequired: At least one default storage location is required
projects.onlyOneDefaultDelivery: Only one default delivery location is allowed
projects.onlyOneDefaultStorage: Only one default storage location is allowed

rfqs.onlyClosedCanArchive: Only closed RFQs can be archived
rfqs.invalidDeliveryLocation: Delivery location does not belong to the selected project
rfqs.invalidVendorIds: Some vendor IDs are invalid or do not belong to vendor-type companies
rfqs.holdForReleaseRequiresEarliestDelivery: Hold-for-release RFQs require an earliest delivery date
rfqs.cannotEditStatus: Cannot edit RFQ with status "{{status}}". Only DRAFT or OPEN (with no submitted responses) RFQs can be edited.
rfqs.cannotSendNotDraft: Cannot send RFQ with status "{{status}}". Only DRAFT RFQs can be sent.
rfqs.mustHaveLineItems: RFQ must have at least one line item before sending
rfqs.mustHaveVendors: RFQ must have at least one invited vendor before sending

purchaseOrders.invalidDeliveryLocation: Delivery location does not belong to the selected project
purchaseOrders.cannotApprove: Cannot approve PO with status "{{status}}". Only Pending POs can be approved.
purchaseOrders.cannotEditNonDraft: Only Draft purchase orders can be edited. Use change request flow for issued POs.
purchaseOrders.cannotIssue: Cannot issue PO with status "{{status}}". Only Draft POs can be issued.
purchaseOrders.holdForReleaseRequiresDeadline: Hold-for-release orders require an earliest delivery date (deadlineStart).
purchaseOrders.cannotConfirm: Cannot confirm PO with status "{{status}}". Only Sent POs can be confirmed by the vendor.
purchaseOrders.cannotAccept: Cannot accept PO with status "{{status}}". Only Acknowledged POs can be accepted by the vendor.
purchaseOrders.cannotVendorDecline: Cannot decline PO with status "{{status}}". Only Sent or Acknowledged POs can be declined by the vendor.
purchaseOrders.onlyClosedCanArchive: Only closed purchase orders can be archived
purchaseOrders.approvalThresholdExceeded: PO total {{amount}} {{currency}} exceeds your approval threshold of {{threshold}} {{currency}}. A higher-tier approver must approve this PO.

bulkOrders.lineItemNotFound: Bulk Order line item not found
bulkOrders.cannotModifyClosed: Cannot modify a bulk order with status "{{status}}"
bulkOrders.cannotChangeOwnRequest: Cannot approve or reject your own change request

invoices.cannotApprove: Cannot approve invoice with status "{{status}}". Only Pending invoices can be approved.
invoices.cannotReject: Cannot reject invoice with status "{{status}}". Only Pending invoices can be rejected.

storage.onlyImagesAllowedFormats: Only image files are allowed (jpeg, png, webp)

export.invalidFormatCsvPdfXlsx: Invalid format. Must be CSV, PDF, or XLSX
export.invalidFormatPdfCsv: Invalid format. Must be PDF or CSV

vendors.userEmailInUse: A user with this email already exists
vendors.accessDenied: You do not have access to this vendor

messages.notParticipant: You are not a participant in this thread
messages.documentClosed: Cannot send messages — the related document is closed

quotes.onlyVendor: Only vendors can submit or update quotes

roles.thresholdNotSupported: Permission "{{key}}" does not support a monetary threshold
